title: narcissus poeticus var. poetarum
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. poetarum, also known as the Poet's Narcissus, is a rare and fragrant variety of the Narcissus poeticus species, which is a type of wild daffodil. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus var. poetarum include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
